TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Elmer_Behnke, title = Elmer_Behnke, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Elmer_Behnke} }

S.FORM: Elmer Behnke sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1929, ryax sa tay 3 nqu tay 2, Elmer Behnke, squliq na p'unro. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players

Elmer Behnke sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1929, ryax sa tay 3 nqu tay 2, Elmer Behnke, squliq na p'unro. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: elmer βeħnke s~ɕraral ħjaʔɣa s~ɕis~ɕjuw na nβa, wal malaxmis~ɕuq qanij la. kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj * nqu taj *, elmer βeħnke, s~ɕquliq na pʔunro. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ
